objective: Independently review the complete live HCM-0.1 control pack after all recorded remediations, retest all nine prior actionable findings, and close HCM-0.1 only if the complete proof wall passes with no unresolved actionable finding.

sections: Phase 3 — Vocabulary, Context Resolution, Snapshot Memory, and Projections

work_completed: Read and independently reviewed docs/START_HERE.md, the complete HCM-0.1 control pack 00 through 08, the active architecture lineage sections, all three prior review records, all three remediation records, both handoff schemas, the template, dispatch template, validator, the complete canonical record history, ledger, and the dispatch-named live Rust and Charter assets.
Retested HCM-R-F-001 through HCM-R-F-006, HCM-R2-F-001, HCM-R3-F-001, and HCM-R3-F-002 against live files and found no unresolved actionable finding or remediation regression.

Confirmed fixed deterministic pre-Phase-3 human-review outputs are renderer-derived views with no Context Resolution input, outside the capitalized Phase-3 Projection request/result/provenance contract, with no precursor Projection engine or second provenance subset.

Confirmed current runtime truth remains fixed artifact/layout and Markdown-canonical plus structured-authoring precursors; target kind, instance, intake, candidate, posture, Context Resolution, Snapshot Memory, and Projection runtime seams remain unimplemented.

Ran the normal Draft 2020-12 handoff validator, its historical-v1.0 admission self-test, an independent seven-pair/hash and unknown/modified/deleted exact-rebuild harness, bounded terminology/link/portability/archive/docs-only/diff checks, and read-only GitNexus scope analysis.
Completed the clean fresh independent review and satisfied the HCM-0.1 control-pack proof gate without changing any reviewed file.

deliverables.summary: Immutable v1.1 different-fresh-review record closing HCM-0.1 after all nine prior findings and the full proof wall retested cleanly.

decisions.summary: All nine prior actionable findings retest cleanly against the complete live pack, handoff infrastructure, history, and bounded runtime truth; no new actionable finding or remediation regression remains.
decisions.authority_effect: The completed-clean-independent-review requirement is satisfied for HCM-0.1; no additional remediation session is required for this slice.

decisions.summary: The HCM-0.1 context-engineering control-pack proof gate is satisfied and HCM-0.1 is closed with status completed.
decisions.authority_effect: Only the docs/control-pack slice closes. This decision does not freeze later Phase 0 semantic contracts, authorize Rust, satisfy any runtime/open program proof gate, promote any seam label, or approve the shipped default artifact set.

decisions.summary: The strict renderer-derived-view versus capitalized Projection boundary and exact seven-record historical-v1.0 presence/admission boundary are coherent and mechanically proven.
decisions.authority_effect: Phase 2 receives no generic or Resolution-aware precursor Projection engine and no separate provenance subset; all seven admitted v1.0 records remain immutable and mandatory, while new handoffs remain v1.1-only.

validation.evidence_ref: 04 requires a completed different-fresh clean review after remediation; 06 requires completion with no unresolved actionable finding.

validation.evidence_ref: Phase 2 is fixed deterministic non-Resolution first-party rendering only; generic configured custom-kind and Resolution-aware Projections begin after HCM-3.2/HCM-3.3.
Repository-owned validate_handoffs.py validates both schemas, the v1.1 template, all records and ledger entries, uniqueness, parity, and a byte-identical rebuild; jq is syntax-only.
Historical exact v1.0 records route only through the admission map; every new record and the current template use v1.1, whose top-level required set includes snapshot_refs and semantic_refs.
Both bounded windows declare count/source/cursor/ordering and 05 defines deterministic null and opaque continuation semantics.
The descriptor example and instance gate carry stable schema_id/schema_version independently from kind_ref.
Exact seven filename/ID/SHA-256 admission is enforced; otherwise-schema-valid unknown and byte-modified v1.0 cases fail after exact ledger rebuild.

validation.evidence_ref: The complete pack keeps fixed pre-Phase-3 outputs outside the Phase-3 request/result/provenance contract with no Context Resolution input, no precursor engine, and no second provenance subset.
Normal validation requires the exact seven-filename historical set; the self-test and independent harness reject deletion after exact ledger rebuild.

Unknown otherwise-schema-valid, byte-modified admitted, and deleted admitted v1.0 history each fail for the expected reason after exact ledger rebuild.

validation.evidence_ref: Required renderer/Projection language is coherent; checked targets resolve; active control surfaces contain no machine-absolute path or archive authority link; tools/check_archive_boundary.py and --self-test pass.

validation.evidence_ref: All dirty paths remain under docs/specs/handbook-contract-membrane/ and the whitespace check passes.

validation.evidence_ref: Index is current at a3babd2; accumulated indexed changes affect only docs symbols, zero execution processes, and report low risk.

next_session.objective: Select this clean closure handoff and dispatch the next authorized bounded Phase 0 documentation/design session from the live phase map; do not treat HCM-0.1 closure as approval of later semantic contracts, implementation, or shipped defaults.
allowed_scope: Revalidate this closure record, current live tree, and the Phase 0 sequence.
Select exactly one next bounded docs/design objective and write its orchestration dispatch and closeout record.
prohibited_scope: Do not reopen HCM-0.1 without new exact evidence.
Do not authorize Rust or promote any runtime seam from this docs-only closure.
Do not infer or approve the shipped default artifact set outside HCM-0.6 research and user decision.
Do not treat preliminary 02/05 target contracts as frozen merely because the control-pack container closed.
acceptance_criteria: The latest closure handoff and current repo truth are revalidated.
The next dispatch names one exact Phase 0 docs/design objective, proof change, authority boundary, and non-goals.
All runtime/open program gates and seam classifications remain unchanged unless separately proved by an authorized later slice.
stop_conditions: Stop if the next step would require implementation authority or a shipped-default decision not yet produced.
Stop and record exact drift if current live truth no longer matches this closure handoff.

chat_summary: Different fresh closure review retested all nine prior findings and the complete HCM-0.1 proof wall cleanly. HCM-0.1 is completed and closed; no Rust/runtime gate, seam label, later Phase 0 contract, or shipped default is authorized or promoted.
